name: ExtensionPlanDefinition_Action_Participant_Type
title: R5: careteam | device | group | healthcareservice | location | organization | patient | practitioner | practitionerrole | relatedperson
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `PlanDefinition.action.participant.type` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
